description: Banks/weapons to leave vanilla until a safe 4.0 remap exists. Seeded from known Fox 3.8 breakage reports.
notes: Krinkova 3.0.1 reverted TT / gold TT / SKS to vanilla to avoid invisible parts.
Community reports: VSS / AS VAL / SR3M audio remaps caused missing models or silent guns on some clients.
Expand this list during inventory if a Fox bundle has no 4.0 counterpart or pathID map fails.
